recommendations.title: Rabbit Hole
recommendations.overview: Life for a happy couple is turned upside down after their young son dies in an accident.

recommendations.title: Hedwig and the Angry Inch
recommendations.overview: Raised a boy in East Berlin, Hedwig undergoes a personal transformation in order to emigrate to the U.S., where she reinvents herself as an 'internationally ignored' but divinely talented rock diva, inhabiting a 'beautiful gender of one'.

recommendations.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
recommendations.overview: In 1970s London, a teenage outsider named Enn falls in love with a rebellious alien girl named Zan, who has come to Earth for a party. Together, they navigate the complexities of intergalactic culture and the trials of first love.

recommendations.title: The Piano Teacher
recommendations.overview: Erika Kohut, a sexually repressed piano teacher living with her domineering mother, meets a young man who starts romantically pursuing her.

recommendations.title: Caramel
recommendations.overview: In a beauty salon in Beirut the lives of five women cross paths. The beauty salon is a colorful and sensual microcosm where they share and entrust their hopes, fears and expectations.

recommendations.title: Nappily Ever After
recommendations.overview: After an accident at the hair salon, Violet realizes she's not living life to the fullest. A soulful barber helps her put the pieces back together.

recommendations.title: Mario
recommendations.overview: Two young gay soccer players get caught up between the politics of the game and the politics of love.

recommendations.title: Steel Magnolias
recommendations.overview: A young beautician, newly arrived in a small Louisiana town, finds work at the local salon, where a small group of women share a close bond of friendship and welcome her into the fold.

recommendations.title: SLC Punk
recommendations.overview: Two former geeks become 1980s punks, then party and go to concerts while deciding what to do with their lives.

recommendations.title: All Three of Us
recommendations.overview: An Iranian family survives the shah and the ayatollah and moves to France. This story follows the family through it all. Despite the politics, revolution, prison, beatings, assassinations and suicides this is a comedy.
